scripts.build: npm run build -w @corp-swarm/schema && npm run build -w @corp-swarm/roles && npm run build -w @corp-swarm/server && npm run build -w @corp-swarm/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @corp-swarm/schema && npm run typecheck -w @corp-swarm/roles && npm run typecheck -w @corp-swarm/server && npm run typecheck -w @corp-swarm/web
